# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# PRANA-G AI — requirements.txt
# Generated by scanning all .py files in the project
# Install with: pip install -r requirements.txt
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────

# ── Core ML / Deep Learning ──────────────────
torch>=2.0.0                  # PINNs, loss functions, neural networks (base_pinn.py, physics_models.py)
numpy>=1.24.0                 # Array math used everywhere

# ── Data Handling ────────────────────────────
pandas>=2.0.0                 # DataFrames, CSV reading/writing
duckdb>=0.9.0                 # Fast batch queries on Parquet files (batch_simulator.py)
pyarrow>=12.0.0               # Required for Parquet file support with pandas/duckdb

# ── Machine Learning (Surrogate Models) ──────
scikit-learn>=1.3.0           # GradientBoostingRegressor, RandomForestRegressor, r2_score (surrogate_trainer.py)
joblib>=1.3.0                 # Saving/loading surrogate models (.joblib files)

# ── Visualisation / Dashboards ───────────────
matplotlib>=3.7.0             # Plots and charts (visualization.py, dashboard_generator.py)

# ── System / Utilities ───────────────────────
psutil>=5.9.0                 # CPU/RAM monitoring (performance_monitor.py)
requests>=2.31.0              # HTTP calls (feedback_loop.py)
google-generativeai           # Gemini API for DAG Router
python-dotenv                 # Loading .env files
pandas
deepxde
sympy
pytorch_lightning


joblib
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# NOTES
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# The following standard-library modules need NO installation:
#   argparse, json, os, sys, time, random, re, pathlib,
#   datetime, collections, dataclasses, typing, subprocess, platform
#
# The following are referenced in docs/README but NOT imported
# in the actual code yet (future/production use):
#   nvidia-modulus   → PINN training at scale
#   deepxde          → alternative PINN library
#   pyspark          → 525M entity batch processing
#   mlflow           → model versioning
#   dvc              → data version control
#   sympy            → automatic loss/PDE generation
#   qdrant-client    → vector search (Team 2)
#   chromadb         → vector DB (Team 2)
